description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, workflow dispatch, and a monthly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: build-linux, build-flatpak, and build-windows. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-18.04, builds on Linux with Release and Debug configurations, and uploads artifacts. The build-flatpak job runs under Flatpak on ubuntu-latest and builds with a manifest path. The build-windows job runs on windows-2019, builds on Windows with Release and Debug configurations and COF options, and uploads artifacts.
